SAKURAMOD-REFLECTION_POWER.title: Reflection
SAKURAMOD-REFLECTION_POWER.description: The next time your Block prevents attack damage, reflect half of it, rounded up.
SAKURAMOD-REFLECTION_POWER.smartDescript: Reflect half of blocked attack damage.
SAKURAMOD-STRONG_REFLECTION_POWER.title: Reflection
SAKURAMOD-STRONG_REFLECTION_POWER.descri: The next time your Block prevents attack damage, reflect all of it.
SAKURAMOD-LUCID_GUARD_POWER.title: Lucid Guard
SAKURAMOD-LUCID_GUARD_POWER.description: The next attack damage you take this turn is capped.
SAKURAMOD-LUCID_PIERCE_POWER.title: Lucid
SAKURAMOD-LUCID_PIERCE_POWER.description: Your next Attack this turn ignores enemy Block.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_FROSTBITE_POWER.title: Frostbite
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_FROSTBITE_POWER.descrip: Every 10 Frostbite increases attack damage received by 10%. At turn start, Frostbite is halved.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_FROSTBITE_POWER.smartDe: Increases attack damage received by {Amount}%. At turn start, Frostbite is halved.
SAKURAMOD-WIND_ELEMENT_POWER.title: Wind
SAKURAMOD-WATER_ELEMENT_POWER.title: Water
SAKURAMOD-FIRE_ELEMENT_POWER.title: Fire
SAKURAMOD-EARTH_ELEMENT_POWER.title: Earth
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_TEMPORARY_STRENGTH_POWE: Attack damage dealt is modified this turn. Removed at end of turn.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_TEMPORARY_DEXTERITY_POW: Block gained from cards is modified this turn. Removed at end of turn.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_COSTUME_POWER.title: Dream Costume
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_COSTUME_POWER.descriptio: The first Temporary card you play each turn costs 1 less.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_COST_REDUCTION_POWER.de: A tracked card costs 1 less this turn.
SAKURAMOD-RECORD_POWER.title: Record
SAKURAMOD-RECORD_POWER.description: HP and Block are recorded. The next Released Record sets your HP and Block to the recorded values.
SAKURAMOD-RECORD_POWER.smartDescription: Recorded HP {RecordedHp:diff()} and Block {RecordedBlock:diff()}. The next Released Record replays them and removes this.
SAKURAMOD-BLESSING_OF_THE_NAMELESS_BOOK_: At the start of your turn, a Clear Card in hand gains Release this turn. The first time each turn you play a Released card, trigger this again.
SAKURAMOD-CLOCK_COUNTRY_ALICE_POWER.desc: Temporary cards removed from combat record damage and Block. At the start of your next turn, create Reading.
SAKURAMOD-CLOCK_COUNTRY_ALICE_POWER.smar: Temporary removal records damage and Block.
SAKURAMOD-FALSE_DAILY_LIFE_POWER.title: False Daily Life
SAKURAMOD-FALSE_DAILY_LIFE_POWER.descrip: Cards gaining Temporary deal damage to a random enemy. Temporary cards removed from combat grant Block.
SAKURAMOD-FALSE_DAILY_LIFE_POWER.smartDe: Temporary grants hit. Temporary removal grants Block.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_BOND_POWER.title: Kero Bond
SAKURAMOD-KERO_BOND_POWER.description: Your maximum hand size is increased. The first Clear Card you play each turn draws cards.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_BOND_POWER.smartDescripti: Max hand size up. First Clear Card draws.
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_BOND_POWER.title: Tomoyo Bond
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_BOND_POWER.description: Every 2 Clear Cards you play grants Energy.
SAKURAMOD-SYAORAN_BOND_POWER.title: Syaoran Bond
SAKURAMOD-SYAORAN_BOND_POWER.description: Clear Cards you play deal damage to a random enemy.
SAKURAMOD-SYAORAN_BOND_POWER.smartDescri: Clear Cards hit a random enemy.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_BLOCK_NEXT_TURN_POWER.d: At the start of your next turn, gain Block.
SAKURAMOD-PROMISE_MANIFEST_POWER.title: Promise
SAKURAMOD-PROMISE_MANIFEST_POWER.descrip: At the start of your next turn, if you did not lose HP, Manifest cards.
SAKURAMOD-PROMISE_MANIFEST_POWER.smartDe: Next turn: Manifest if HP was not lost.
SAKURAMOD-DREAMING_POWER.title: Dreaming
SAKURAMOD-DREAMING_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, Manifest cards.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_REGENERATION_POWER.desc: At the start of your turn, heal HP, then reduce this by 1.
SAKURAMOD-GRAVITATION_HOLD_POWER.title: Gravitation Hold
SAKURAMOD-GRAVITATION_HOLD_POWER.descrip: Played cards return to your hand and do not enter your discard pile. You cannot draw cards.
SAKURAMOD-GRAVITATION_HOLD_POWER.smartDe: Played cards return to hand. Cannot draw.
SAKURAMOD-MIRAGE_IMAGE_POWER.title: Mirage Image
SAKURAMOD-MIRAGE_IMAGE_POWER.description: The next time you would take attack damage this turn, reduce it.
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_AWAKENING_POWER.title: Magic Awakening
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_AWAKENING_POWER.descript: At the start of your turn, gain Energy and Manifest Clear Cards.
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_AWAKENING_POWER.smartDes: Start of turn: Energy and Manifest.
SAKURAMOD-STAR_WAND_POWER.title: Star
SAKURAMOD-STAR_WAND_POWER.description: Released cards build Star. At 2 Star, draw 1 card, gain 1 Energy, and lose 2 Star.
SAKURAMOD-TIME_STOP_POWER.title: Time
SAKURAMOD-TIME_STOP_POWER.description: You will take an extra turn before enemies act.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY_RESONANCE_POWER.desc: At end of turn, choose a Temporary card in combat and remove Temporary from it.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY_RESONANCE_POWER.smar: Choose a Temporary card to stabilize.
